content: I'm so excited, I just adopted a golden retriever named Willow from a shelter last weekend! She's already settled into my home in Paris.
Congratulations on the new furry family member! How's Willow adjusting to your busy schedule as an opera singer?
It's been a challenge, but my neighbor, Madame Dupont, has been helping me out with dog walking when I'm away performing. I'm actually getting ready for a show at the Palais Garnier next month.
That's great to hear! I'm sure Willow will bring some comfort to your life. Have you thought about how you'll balance your touring schedule with caring for a pet?
Yes, I've already spoken with my manager, and we're working out a plan for my upcoming performances in Vienna and Berlin. I might need to hire a dog sitter for those trips.
It's good that you're thinking ahead. What kind of activities do you enjoy doing with Willow? Do you have a favorite park or hiking spot in Paris?
We love going to the Luxembourg Gardens! It's so beautiful, especially during the spring. I've also been trying to teach Willow some basic commands in French.
That sounds like a great way to spend time together. Are you planning on taking any fun trips with Willow this summer? Perhaps to the countryside?
Actually, I was thinking of renting a cottage in the countryside for a month. It'll be a great opportunity for me to focus on my gardening hobby and spend quality time with Willow.
A month in the countryside sounds like the perfect getaway. You can even try your hand at foraging for wild mushrooms, if you're interested.
I've always wanted to try mushroom foraging! I've heard it's a great hobby. Maybe I'll even find some time to practice my calligraphy while I'm there.
It's wonderful that you have so many diverse interests. Do you think your experience as an opera singer has influenced your approach to other hobbies, like gardening or calligraphy?
Definitely. I think my attention to detail and creativity have really helped me in those areas. I'm looking forward to seeing how Willow enjoys the countryside, too!
I'm sure she'll love it. It was great chatting with you, Finley. Enjoy your time with Willow, and don't hesitate to reach out if you need any more advice or recommendations!
